name: Oatmeal Cookies 2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the oil and date sugar until well blended and smooth.
2. Add the sorghum, soy milk, vanilla extract, flour, baking soda, salt, rolled oats, raisins, and cinnamon to the bowl with the oil mixture. Mix everything together until combined.
3. Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Scoop tablespoon-sized portions of dough onto a lined baking sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
5. Bake for 10 minutes, or until the bottoms of the cookies start to turn brown.
6. Turn off the oven and let the cookies cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before removing them.
